name: KATCHAI - BEGINNER
subdesc: Traditional way of wearing a cloth around waist named as Katchai
desc: Katchai Grading System contains 3 levels. Karuppu Katchai, Karuppu Sivappu Katchai and Sivappu Katchai which includes single stick, double stick techniques.

name: KAAPPU - INTERMEDIATE
subdesc: Traditional way of wearing a rope/band around hands named as Kaappu
desc: Kappuu Grading System contains the intermeditate level techniques of silambam. Also includes weapon training like Surru Vaal and Vaal Kambu.

name: PARIVATTAM - ADVANCED
subdesc: Traditional way of wearing a cloth around head named as Parivattam
desc: Parivattam Grading System contains the advanced level techniques of silambam. Also includes weapon training like Vaal Veechu, Maan Kombu.
